* feat(savia-mobile): chat timestamps, bridge dedup fix, session persistence (v2.76.0)

- Add HH:mm timestamps to message bubbles in ChatScreen for traceability
- Fix bridge duplicate text: suppress result event when streaming already delivered content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add missing v2.76.0 link + CI check for changelog links

The v2.76.0 entry was merged without its reference link at the
bottom of CHANGELOG.md — a recurring issue. Added Gate 6 to
ci-extended-checks.sh that validates every ## [X.Y.Z] header
has a matching [X.Y.Z]: https://... link at the end of the file.
This makes CI fail on any PR that adds a changelog entry without
its corresponding comparison link.

refactor: switch variables table from scope_id to clerk_org_id (#4138)

* refactor: switch variables table from scope_id to clerk_org_id

Part of Phase 3 Scope → Clerk migration (#4130). All variable queries
and writes now use clerk_org_id instead of scope_id. Migration drops
old scope-based indexes and FK, makes scope_id nullable (column kept
for Phase 5 cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use clerk_org_id for variable validation in run-service

The validateComposeRequirements function was still passing scope UUID
to getVariableValues which now expects clerkOrgId. This would cause
checkEnv variable validation to silently fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: keep scope_id not-null and continue writing it in variable inserts

Align with other Phase 3 PRs (#4143, #4142) that keep scopeId as
notNull and continue writing it in INSERT statements. The column
will be dropped in Phase 5.

feat: Properly resample NXT after-hours data to match candle timeframe

Previously NXT snapshots (5-min intervals with cumulative day OHLCV)
were appended raw to any timeframe DataFrame, mixing 5-min rows into
60-min candles. Now:

1. _nxt_snapshots_to_candles() converts cumulative NXT data to proper
   per-period candles (open=prev close, volume=diff, high/low from
   day cumulative changes)
2. Resamples to target frequency (60min, 30min, 15min, etc.)
3. Includes today's Google Sheets data (not just historical)
4. Real-time NXT snapshot fills gap since last Sheets save

Result: 60-min view shows proper 16:00, 17:00, 18:00 NXT candles.

commit.message:
Add formal validation, ML v2, portfolio optimization, and paper trading

Step 1 - Formal validation of top 15 strategies:
- Walk-forward 70/30: 10/15 pass out-of-sample
- T-test: p<0.05 for all 10 validated strategies
- Monte Carlo 1000x: all 100% profitable
- Quartile stability: 3/4+ quartiles profitable
- xtf_15m_predicts_5m verified: 0 look-ahead violations, holds at 5c slippage

Step 2 - ML strategies refactored (train once, eval OOS):
- RandomForest best ML (Sharpe 14.14 OOS), but doesn't beat xtf_15m_predicts_5m (19.11)

Step 3 - Final portfolio (8 validated strategies):
- OOS: 21K trades, 58.8% WR, $300K P&L, Sharpe 13.87, max DD 16.1%

Step 4 - Paper trading infrastructure (no real orders):
- Live market detection via Gamma API
- BTC candles via Binance
- Signal logging to SQLite + JSONL

commit.message:
fix: stop infinite prefetch loop causing repeated API calls

The prefetch useEffect was comparing pagination.currentPage !== prefetchedPage,
which was always true after prefetch (1 !== 2), causing an infinite loop.
Changed to compare nextPage === prefetchedPage to correctly skip already-prefetched pages.

and test infrastructure. Overall enforcement: 30% → 95%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add design docs extracted from 226-commit git history

Four design records distilled from the full project history:

004-edit-cell-two-step-flow: documents the explicit revert from auto-commit
  back to staged (badf034 → 93029b3). The invariant "C-c C-c stages, never
  executes immediately in edit buffer" must not be broken again.

005-sql-rewrite-engine: three failed approaches to COUNT rewrite (subquery
  wrapping causes MySQL [1060] duplicate column error on JOINs; SELECT-list
  replacement breaks on GROUP BY/HAVING); WHERE filter brittle string
  injection broke on CTEs/UNIONs; explains why CLAUDE.md guardrails exist
  and documents the AST-rewriting roadmap item.

006-copy-export-ux: five overlapping copy commands condensed to one (c)
  over ~10 commits; documents the visual refine mode origin, why copy was
  removed from record view entirely, and the "do not re-proliferate copy
  keybindings" principle.

007-result-buffer-layout: four layout iterations; vscroll reset hook tried
  and permanently removed (pixel-scroll-precision-mode incompatibility);
  scroll position preservation via recenter; cursor gutter fallback fix;
  row numbers via line-prefix property.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove num_batches_fetched from metadata tables (#1029)

Remove _num_batches_fetched column from envio_chains table definition,
meta fields, and all runtime tracking. The chain_metadata view keeps
the num_batches_fetched field for backwards compatibility but always
returns 0. The SyncETA component now uses knownHeight and
latestFetchedBlockNumber to determine when to display ETA instead
of relying on batch count.

commit.message:
Add story rotation, auto-tagging, and narrative thinking buffer

- narrative_log table tracks which stories were used in narratives
- Stories used in last 7 days are skipped for general "tell me a story"
  (specific queries like "tell me about grandma" bypass rotation)
- All stories reset if every story was recently used
- Auto-tag stories on save: extracts people (family members + speaker),
  places (capitalized words after in/at/from), and years (1900-2030)
- "Thinking" buffer phrase plays before GPT generates narrative
  (e.g. "Let me think of a story for you") so user isn't waiting in silence

commit.message:
Fix Router.Scope to accept ScopeOption args and prevent double-dot name prefixes

Router.Scope now accepts variadic ScopeOption arguments (matching
Scope.Scope), so callers can pass WithNamePrefix/WithTemplatePrefix
directly. WithNamePrefix strips trailing dots to avoid double-dot
separators when composed with effectiveName's automatic "." joiner.
